zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith de Boulogne於大約0935年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易布洛-拉-格拉斯時，她的父親Berenge de Boulogne37歲，母親di Peronni17歲。她於0954年與Balso de Bayeux在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1034年在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也享年100歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judith de Boulogne于大约0935年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易布洛-拉-格拉斯时，她的父亲Berenge de Boulogne37岁，母亲di Peronni17岁。她于0954年与Balso de Bayeux在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1034年在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也享年100岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith de Boulogne was born about 0935, in Boulogne-la-Grasse, Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Berenge de Boulogne, was 37 and her mother, di Peronni, was 17. She married Balso de Bayeux in 0954, in Bayeux, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1034, in Bayeux, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith de Boulogne est née environ 0935, à Boulogne-la-Grasse, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Berenge de Boulogne, avait 37 ans et sa mère, di Peronni, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Balso de Bayeux en 0954, à Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1034, à Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith de Boulogne um 0935 in Boulogne-la-Grasse, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Berenge de Boulogne 37 und ihre Mutter di Peronni 17. Sie hat 0954 in Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich Balso de Bayeux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1034 im Alter von 100 Jahren in Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith de Boulogne è nata il circa 0935 nel Boulogne-la-Grasse, Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Berenge de Boulogne, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, di Peronni, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Balso de Bayeux nel 0954, nel Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1034, nel Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 100 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith de Boulogneが約0935年にフランスピカーディオイゼボウログネ-ラ-グラッセで生まれた時，父Berenge de Boulogneは37歳，母di Peronniは17歳であった。0954年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスバイエウックスでBalso de Bayeuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1034年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスバイエウックスで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Judith de Boulogne(이)가 대략 0935년 프랑스 피카디 이스 부로그니-라-그래스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Berenge de Boulogne(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 di Peronni(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 0954년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 베이우스에서 Balso de Bayeux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1034년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 베이우스에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith de Boulogne nasceu aproximadamente 0935, em Boulogne-la-Grasse, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Berenge de Boulogne, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, di Peronni, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Balso de Bayeux em 0954, em Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1034, em Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 100 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith de Boulogne родилась около 0935 г. в местности боулогне-ла-грасс, оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Berenge de Boulogne было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали di Peronni, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Balso de Bayeux в 0954 г. в местности беиеукс, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1034 г. в местности беиеукс, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 100 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Judith de Boulogne nació aproximadamente 0935, en Boulogne-la-Grasse, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Berenge de Boulogne, tenía 37 años y su mamá, di Peronni, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Balso de Bayeux en 0954, en Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1034, en Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 100 años.
